subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: A sanitary plumbing system must be in accordance with AS/NZS 3500.2 with the following variation:
For clause 2.3 delete paragraph (a) and insert:

ol.li:
Bends in pipes shall —
have a throat radius complying with AS/NZS 1260:2017 (PVC-U pipes and fittings for drain, waste and vent applications) Table 5.6 and Figure B6; and
be free from wrinkling and flattening
